title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click, automating both control plane and data plane management. It integrates with Karpenter for auto-scaling and supports AI workloads including inference and training on GPU hardware.
